locations.name: 喀麦隆
locations.summary: 喀麥隆共和國（法語：République du Cameroun；英語：Republic of Cameroon），通稱喀麥隆（法語：Cameroun；英語：Cameroon），是位於非洲中西部的單一制共和國。喀麥隆西方與奈及利亞接壤，東…

locations.name: Bakossi Forest Reserve

locations.name: 庫佩山
locations.summary: 庫佩山（法語：Mont Koupé），是喀麥隆的山峰，位於巴門達高原，海拔高度2,064米，山體由花崗岩和正長岩組成，是鬼狒、黑猩猩、麂羚等野生動物的棲息地，該地區有約140,000居民聚居。 參考資料 Piet Stoffelen; M…

relations.subject: Mount Kupe bushshrike
relations.evidence: It was previously thought to be endemic to Cameroon, where it is found in the Bakossi Forest Reserve and in particular on Mount Kupe, where it has been known to attract ecotourists.Cheek, Martin, and Jean Michel Onana

relations.subject: Mount Kupe bushshrike
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
